title: Senior Financial Analyst - AU Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - AU Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with AU Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About AU Small Finance Bank:
AU Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank!
